title: Fix UVM fork..join_none local variable can't locate varref scope
body:
Test I'm about to commit extracted from UVM has

```
   fork
      automatic int k = i;
      begin
         $display("[%0t] start %0d", $time, k);
         //UVM's: arb_sequence_q[is_relevant_entries[k]].wait_for_relevant();
         ...
      end
   join_none
```

And gives

'%Error: Internal Error: t/t_fork_none_var.v:25:69: ../V3Scope.cpp:80: Can't locate varref scope'

The join_none is necessary for this.

This is one of a few tests blocking UVM post-elaboration.
